block_02: The Company conducts regular reviews in order to ensure compliance with the AML requirements. Furthermore, since your activity is based on cryptocurrency you are required to provide us with the following:

block_05: Payslip - the most recent one if possible and not older than 3 months OR a proof that you own your own business/contract
block_06: Economic Profile Questionnaire (please find the link below)
block_07: We kindly ask you to upload the requested documents to your personal cabinet and complete
